subject: [PATCH 09/14] mm/userfaultfd: add RWP fault delivery and expose UFFDIO_REGISTER_MODE_RWP

reviews.author: Kiryl Shutsemau (Meta)
reviews.summary: The patch author provided a detailed explanation of the RWP fault delivery mechanism and its implementation in various kernel components. They also clarified that the PROT_NONE restoration on swap-in is performed earlier in the series, addressing concerns about swapped-in RWP pages.

2026-04-27.patch_summary: This patch series adds support for read-write protection (RWP) to the userfaultfd interface, allowing userspace to track and manage RWP-protected pages. The implementation involves modifying various kernel components, including memory management, huge page handling, and userfaultfd code. The goal is to enable efficient tracking of RWP-protected pages and provide a robust mechanism for managing these pages.
